positive: A kawaii-style illustration of a friendly bear wearing a tiny bow tie, sitting next to a towering stack of rainbow-colored cupcakes. The bear is holding a small teacup. The scene should be brightly lit and cheerful, evoking a sweet, whimsical feeling. Style: Kawaii anime art, vector illustration, clean outlines, pastel colors, flat lighting, highly marketable, perfect for stickers or mugs, ultra-cute, adorable.
